@if (viewState() === 'create' || viewState() === 'detail') { } @if (viewState() === 'list') { }
@if (viewState() === 'create') {

Vendor Backstage

Create a new organisation and send an activation link to the first Director.

@if (errorMessage()) {
{{ errorMessage() }}
}
@if (form.controls.name.invalid && form.controls.name.touched) {
@if (form.controls.name.errors?.['required']) { Organisation name is required. } @if (form.controls.name.errors?.['maxlength']) { Organisation name is too long (256 characters max). }
}
@if (form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.invalid && form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.touched) {
@if (form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.errors?.['required']) { Director email is required. } @if (form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.errors?.['email']) { Please enter a valid email address. } @if (form.controls.targetDirectorEmail.errors?.['maxlength']) { Email is too long. }
}
} @if (viewState() === 'list') {

Organisations

View all organisations and their status.

@if (errorMessage()) {
{{ errorMessage() }}
} @if (loadingList()) {
Loading organisations...
} @else if (organisations().length === 0) {
No organisations created yet.
} @else { @for (org of organisations(); track org.id) { }
Name Status Directors Created
{{ org.name }} @if (org.hasPendingRecovery) { Recovery Needed } @else if (org.isActive) { Active } @else { Pending } {{ org.directorCount }} {{ org.createdAtUtc | date }}
}
} @if (viewState() === 'detail') { @let org = selectedOrganisation(); @if (loadingDetail()) {
Loading organisation details...
} @else if (org) { @if (org.hasPendingRecovery) {
@if (reissueSuccess()) {
{{ reissueSuccess() }}
} @else {
No active Directors. This organisation has no active Directors. Send a new activation link to resume operations.
@if (org.lastKnownDirectorName) {
Last known Director: {{ org.lastKnownDirectorName }} @if (org.lastKnownDirectorActiveAt) { (last active: {{ org.lastKnownDirectorActiveAt | date }}) }
}

Send Activation Link

@if (reissueError()) {
{{ reissueError() }}
}
@if (reissueForm.controls.targetDirectorEmail.invalid && reissueForm.controls.targetDirectorEmail.touched) {
@if (reissueForm.controls.targetDirectorEmail.errors?.['required']) { Director email is required. } @if (reissueForm.controls.targetDirectorEmail.errors?.['email']) { Please enter a valid email address. }
}
}
}

{{ org.name }}

Status @if (org.hasPendingRecovery) { Recovery Needed } @else if (org.isActive) { Active } @else { Pending }
Directors {{ org.directorCount }}
Created {{ org.createdAtUtc | date }}
} }
